title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules for effective prompting of Claude Code derived from studying how Anthropic engineers use it. The rules emphasize prompting skills rather than features, building composable reusable skills, and iterative improvement across sessions.
